title: Why Bellingham can rescue Real Madrid's Euro dream
summary: Jude Bellingham played a crucial role in Real Madrid's comeback against Bayern Munich in their Champions League first leg and is expected to be instrumental in the return match. His performance could determine Real Madrid's chances of advancing in Europe's premier club competition.
content: Jude Bellingham was behind Real Madrid's late resurgence against Bayern Munich last week in their Champions League first-leg tie, and could be key in Wednesday's return.

zh.title: 为什么贝林厄姆能拯救皇马的欧洲梦
zh.summary: 贝林厄姆在皇马对拜仁慕尼黑的欧冠首回合比赛中扮演了关键角色，预计他在客场也会发挥重要作用。他的表现将决定皇马在欧洲顶级俱乐部赛事中的前景。

title: USWNT's 10-game win streak snapped by Japan
summary: The U.S. Women's National Team's impressive 10-game winning streak came to an end against Japan. This loss marks a significant setback in the team's recent form ahead of upcoming competitions.

zh.title: 美国女足10场不败纪录被日本中断
zh.summary: 美国女足国家队令人印象深刻的10场不败纪录在对日本的比赛中结束。这场失利标志着球队近期状态的重大挫折。

title: Neymar scores, confronts fans after Santos draw
summary: Neymar Jr. scored in Santos' 1-1 Copa Sudamericana draw against Deportivo Recoleta, but tensions flared as he confronted fans following the match. The incident highlights ongoing tensions between the player and supporters.
content: Neymar Jr. scored Santos' only goal in a 1-1 draw against Deportivo Recoleta on Tuesday in a Copa Sudamericana match, before arguing with fans at the end of the game.

zh.title: 内马尔进球后与桑托斯球迷发生对峙
zh.summary: 内马尔在桑托斯对雷科莱塔的南美杯1比1平局中进球，但在比赛结束后与球迷发生了对峙。这一事件凸显了球员与支持者之间持续存在的紧张关系。

title: LAFC closes out Cruz Azul to reach Cup semis
summary: Dennis Bouanga's late penalty gave LAFC a 1-1 draw against defending champion Cruz Azul, securing their advancement to the CONCACAF Champions Cup semifinals. The result represents a significant upset over the tournament's defending champions.
content: Dennis Bouanga scored a late penalty to help LAFC draw 1-1 with defending champion Cruz Azul on Tuesday and advance to the CONCACAF Champions Cup semifinals.

zh.title: LAFC击败克鲁斯亚祖尔晋级杯赛半决赛
zh.summary: 丹尼斯·布安加的后期点球让LAFC与卫冕冠军克鲁斯亚祖尔战成1:1平局，确保了他们晋级CONCACAF冠军杯半决赛。这一结果代表了对赛事卫冕冠军的重大冷门。

title: Does it matter if Wrexham don't get promoted this season?
summary: BBC Sport explores the implications of Wrexham potentially missing out on promotion to the Premier League this season. The analysis considers whether falling short of immediate promotion would have lasting consequences for the ambitious club.
content: BBC Sport examines whether it matters if Wrexham don't seal promotion to the Premier League this season at the first time of asking.

zh.title: 雷克斯汉姆本赛季不升级重要吗？
zh.summary: BBC体育探讨了雷克斯汉姆本赛季可能无法升入英超的影响。分析考虑了未能立即升级是否会对这支野心勃勃的俱乐部造成长期后果。

title: Despite Barça's strong effort, Atléti end their Champions League hopes
summary: Atlético Madrid eliminated Barcelona from the Champions League despite Barcelona's comeback efforts. Diego Simeone's team proved defensively resilient, advancing to the next round.
content: Barcelona looked to stage a huge comeback, but Diego Simeone's Atlético Madrid did enough to prevent the Blaugrana from advancing in the Champions League.

zh.title: 尽管巴塞罗那努力，马竞结束他们的欧冠希望
zh.summary: 尽管巴塞罗那的复仇努力，马德里竞技将巴塞罗那淘汰出欧冠。迪亚戈·西蒙尼的球队展现出防线韧性，晋级下一轮。

title: Liverpool have star power, but PSG show it takes more than talent to truly sparkle
summary: Paris Saint-Germain's disciplined performance eliminated Liverpool from the Champions League. The French side's clinical execution proved superior to Liverpool's individual talent.
content: Liverpool's UCL journey ended with a whimper Tuesday at the hands of a clinical Paris Saint-Germain.

zh.title: 利物浦有明星球员，但巴黎圣日耳曼展现真正的光彩需要不止是天赋
zh.summary: 巴黎圣日耳曼的纪律表现将利物浦淘汰出欧冠。法国球队的精准执行证明了优于利物浦个人天赋的优势。

title: Liverpool fear for 'very-bad' looking Ekitike injury
summary: France striker Hugo Ekitike suffered a serious injury during Liverpool's Champions League quarterfinal loss to PSG, forcing him off in the first half. The injury raises concerns for both Liverpool and the France national team.
content: Hugo Ekitike has handed a major injury worry to Liverpool and France after he was forced off in the first half of his club's Champions League quarterfinal loss to Paris Saint-Germain.

zh.title: 利物浦担心埃基蒂克的"非常严重"伤势
zh.summary: 法国前锋雨果·埃基蒂克在利物浦对阵巴黎圣日耳曼的欧冠四分之一决赛中受伤，在上半场被迫下场。这次伤病令利物浦和法国国家队都感到担忧。

title: Fuming Raphinha: Barcelona 'robbed' in UCL exit
summary: Barcelona player Raphinha criticized the officiating in the team's Champions League elimination to Atlético Madrid. The winger argued that refereeing errors were decisive in the outcome of the tie.
content: Sidelined Barcelona star Raphinha hit out at the officiating following his team Champions League elimination, claiming refereeing errors cost them the tie against Atlético Madrid.

zh.title: 愤怒的拉菲尼亚：巴塞罗那在欧冠出局中遭"黑手"
zh.summary: 巴塞罗那球员拉菲尼亚批评了球队在欧冠被马竞淘汰中的裁判判罚。这位边锋辩称，裁判失误对比赛结果起了决定性作用。

title: PSG eye rare UCL repeat after ousting Liverpool
summary: PSG advanced further in the Champions League after eliminating six-time winners Liverpool. The French club maintains strong prospects for a potential repeat title win.
content: Paris Saint-Germain 's grip on the Champions League trophy remains strong after dumping out six-time winners Liverpool.

zh.title: 巴黎圣日耳曼淘汰利物浦后，期待罕见的欧冠卫冕
zh.summary: 巴黎圣日耳曼淘汰了六次冠军得主利物浦，进一步推进欧冠之路。这家法国俱乐部对潜在的卫冕有着强劲的前景。

title: Simeone 'emotional' as Atleti return to UCL semis
summary: Atlético Madrid reached the Champions League semifinals with a 3-2 aggregate victory over Barcelona. Manager Diego Simeone expressed emotional pride at the achievement, marking the team's first semifinal appearance since 2017.
content: Diego Simeone said watching his Atlético Madrid team compete still makes him "emotional" after eliminating Barcelona 3-2 on aggregate to reach the Champions League semifinals for the first time since 2017.

zh.title: 西蒙尼为马竞重返欧冠半决赛感到"激动"
zh.summary: 马竞以总比分3:2击败巴塞罗那，挺进欧冠半决赛。主帅迪亚戈·西蒙尼为这一成就表示了情感上的骄傲，这是球队自2017年以来首次进入半决赛。

title: USWNT gets sneak peak at WC grass at Lumen
summary: The USWNT previewed the pitch conditions at Lumen Field, which will host World Cup matches this summer. The site visit allows the US team to assess the playing surface before tournament play.
content: The United States is getting a sneak peek at the grass that has been laid down at Lumen Field for this summer's World Cup.

zh.title: 美国女足在Lumen球场抢先预览世界杯草地
zh.summary: 美国女足球队在Lumen球场预览了球场条件，该球场将在今年夏天举办世界杯比赛。这次现场访问使美国队能够在锦标赛开始前评估比赛场地。

title: Bellingham defends connection with Mbappé, Vini
summary: Jude Bellingham expressed confidence in his partnership with Kylian Mbappe and Vinicius Junior for Real Madrid's crucial Champions League quarterfinal against Bayern Munich. The English midfielder believes the trio can deliver in the high-stakes encounter.
content: Jude Bellingham has said that he, Kylian Mbappé and Vinicius Junior can deliver together on the pitch for Real Madrid ahead of an "all-or-nothing" Champions League quarterfinal second leg at Bayern Munich on Wednesday.

zh.title: 贝林厄姆为与姆巴佩、维尼的搭档辩护
zh.summary: 朱德·贝林厄姆对他与基利安·姆巴佩和维尼修斯·朱尼奥尔为皇家马德里对阵拜仁慕尼黑的欧冠四分之一决赛的搭档充满信心。这位英格兰中场球员相信这三人能在这场高风险的比赛中有所作为。

title: FPL Podcast from BBC Sport
summary: The BBC Sport FPL Podcast features hosts Alistair Bruce-Ball, Chris Sutton, and Statman Dave discussing Fantasy Premier League with guest Neil Robertson. The episode provides insights and analysis for FPL managers.
content: Alistair Bruce-Ball, Chris Sutton and Statman Dave are joined by Neil Robertson.

zh.title: BBC体育FPL播客
zh.summary: BBC体育FPL播客由主持人阿利斯特·布鲁斯-鲍尔、克里斯·萨顿和统计员戴夫主持，与嘉宾尼尔·罗伯逊讨论梦幻英超联赛。该集为FPL经理提供了见解和分析。
